journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: Morally-preferred contrasts in troubles talk complaints
title_en: Morally-preferred contrasts in troubles talk complaints
title_zh: 麻烦谈话抱怨中的道德偏好对比
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨人们在谈论麻烦或抱怨时，如何通过对比来展示道德偏好。研究者分析对话，了解人们如何通过比较不同行为或态度来表明什么是道德上更可取的做法。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people use contrasts to show moral preferences when discussing troubles or making complaints. Researchers analyze conversations to understand how individuals compare different behaviors or attitudes to indicate what is morally preferable.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于社会互动和话语分析领域，关注日常对话中的道德表达和人际沟通策略。
research_direction_en: This research falls within the field of social interaction and discourse analysis, focusing on moral expressions and interpersonal communication strategies in everyday conversations.
